TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Triqan ga niya mki sku Toweng si atu Hosing Ku, kwara sali buwan nya ga 18 buwan, 46 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 93% kyan ku 43 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 7% kyan ku 3 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan93%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Triqan hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Triqan hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Triqan hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Triqan hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Triqan hya' ga Kinyawpan. tay mkyahu' na Triqan hya' ga Zihing. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŇč triqan …£a nija mki s~…ēku toweŇč s~…ēi atu ńßos~…ēiŇč ku, kwara s~…ēali ő≤uwan nja …£a ** ő≤uwan, ** ńßi ku kwara s~…ē Ēuli tajan. s~…ē Ēuli tajan pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku ** ńßi, ő≤inańß …£a, Ējat kańßun s~…ēku pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a *% kjan ku * ńßi nja. pins~…ēpuŇč na linńßujan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a, tajan**%. maki qu Ňčas~…ēal ő≤ziran. rńßzjal kki Ēan taj Ēllaw na triqan ńßja Ē …£a r…£jax krańßu Ē. taj Ēzil na triqan ńßja Ē …£a lljuŇč. taj mkjańßu Ē na triqan ńßja Ē …£a r…£jax krańßu Ē. taj mkraja Ē na triqan ńßja Ē …£a lljuŇč. taj mkraja Ē na triqan ńßja Ē …£a kinjawpan. taj mkjańßu Ē na triqan ńßja Ē …£a zińßiŇč. rekis~…ēi kajal kjokaj s~…ēs~…ēquliq pinlp…£an ppqő≤aqan pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē ¶~ ®ikuj pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē mrkjas~…ē tuqi Ēs~…ēan ő≤as~…ēu kis~…ēja Ē …£l…£an s~…ēpjaŇčan na pinő≤ańßu uő≤uj qqmajńß
S.FORM: alang Triqan ga niya mki sku Toweng si atu Hosing Ku, kwara sali buwan nya ga 18 buwan, 46 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 93% kyan ku 43 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 7% kyan ku 3 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan93%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Triqan hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Triqan hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Triqan hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Triqan hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Triqan hya' ga Kinyawpan. tay mkyahu' na Triqan hya' ga Zihing. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŇč triqan …£a nija mki s~…ēku toweŇč s~…ēi atu ńßos~…ēiŇč ku, kwara s~…ēali ő≤uwan nja …£a ** ő≤uwan, ** ńßi ku kwara s~…ē Ēuli tajan. s~…ē Ēuli tajan pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku ** ńßi, ő≤inańß …£a, Ējat kańßun s~…ēku pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a *% kjan ku * ńßi nja. pins~…ēpuŇč na linńßujan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a, tajan**%. maki qu Ňčas~…ēal ő≤ziran. rńßzjal kki Ēan taj Ēllaw na triqan ńßja Ē …£a r…£jax krańßu Ē. taj Ēzil na triqan ńßja Ē …£a lljuŇč. taj mkjańßu Ē na triqan ńßja Ē …£a r…£jax krańßu Ē. taj mkraja Ē na triqan ńßja Ē …£a lljuŇč. taj mkraja Ē na triqan ńßja Ē …£a kinjawpan. taj mkjańßu Ē na triqan ńßja Ē …£a zińßiŇč. rekis~…ēi kajal kjokaj s~…ēs~…ēquliq pinlp…£an ppqő≤aqan pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē ¶~ ®ikuj pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē mrkjas~…ē tuqi Ēs~…ēan ő≤as~…ēu kis~…ēja Ē …£l…£an s~…ēpjaŇčan na pinő≤ańßu uő≤uj qqmajńß
